description: Process museum artifact data for an upcoming exhibition using WPS Spreadsheet. Using the raw artwork records in /home/ga/Documents/moma_exhibition_subset.csv, create a workbook with a sheet named "Collection" that includes three new columns: "Crate_Type", "Conservation_Flag", and "Handling_Category". "Crate_Type" is "Oversize" if Height_cm (Column I) or Width_cm (Column J) is greater than 120, otherwise "Standard". "Conservation_Flag" is "Review" if the Medium (Column D) contains "paper" (case-insensitive), otherwise "OK". "Handling_Category" is "Heavy" if Weight_kg (Column L) is greater than 50, "Fragile" if Classification (Column F) is "Sculpture", and "Standard" otherwise. Additionally, create a "Logistics Dashboard" sheet with a summary table (A1:B6) showing the counts of Total Items, Oversize Crates, Items for Review, Heavy Items, and Fragile Items. Format the header rows as bold, apply an auto-filter to the "Collection" sheet, and save the final workbook to /home/ga/Documents/moma_logistics.xlsx.
